title: 2. Food and Drink: It is not suitable for bloodletting therapy when the patient
text:
Because when the patient is too hungry, the blood is more concentrated and will influence the volume of
bleeding.  Do not perform the bloodletting therapy long after the last meal, because over-hunger causes
needle fainting easily
